description: Catalog of major NOSTR open-source repositories

repos.name: nostr-protocol/nips
repos.description: Nostr Implementation Possibilities - the living specification documents
repos.notes: THE canonical source of truth for the NOSTR protocol

repos.name: nostr-protocol/nostr
repos.description: Overview and description of the nostr protocol
repos.notes: The original protocol description by fiatjaf

repos.name: aljazceru/awesome-nostr
repos.description: Curated list of nostr projects and resources

repos.name: hoytech/strfry
repos.description: High-performance relay implementation backed by LMDB with negentropy sync support
repos.notes: One of the most widely deployed relays; supports negentropy for efficient sync

repos.name: nostr-rs-relay
repos.description: Minimalistic relay written in Rust with SQLite backend
repos.notes: One of the earliest and most stable Rust relay implementations

repos.name: Cameri/nostream
repos.description: Feature-rich Nostr relay written in TypeScript with PostgreSQL backend
repos.notes: Popular TypeScript relay, formerly known as nostr-ts-relay

repos.name: fiatjaf/khatru
repos.description: Framework for building custom Nostr relays in Go
repos.notes: The go-to framework for building specialized relays; used by many projects

repos.name: mikedilger/chorus
repos.description: Rust-based personal or community relay with fine-grained access control
repos.notes: By the author of Gossip client

repos.name: rnostr/rnostr
repos.description: High-performance relay written in Rust with RocksDB backend

repos.name: bitvora/haven
repos.description: Four relays in one plus Blossom media server - personal relay stack
repos.notes: Combines inbox, outbox, private, and chat relays with media hosting

repos.name: bitvora/wot-relay
repos.description: Web-of-trust filtered relay that only accepts notes from trusted pubkeys

repos.name: greenart7c3/Citrine
repos.description: Nostr relay that runs on Android devices

repos.name: Spl0itable/nosflare
repos.description: Serverless Nostr relay on Cloudflare Workers with Durable Objects

repos.name: mattn/cagliostr
repos.description: Faster Nostr relay in C++ focused on raw speed

repos.name: dezh-tech/immortal
repos.description: Relay designed for scale and high-load environments

repos.name: 0ceanslim/grain
repos.description: Highly configurable multipurpose relay with MongoDB backend
repos.notes: Flexible policy engine for relay operators

repos.name: fiatjaf/relayer
repos.description: Server framework for writing custom Nostr relays in Go
repos.notes: Predecessor to khatru; still used by some projects

repos.name: CodyTseng/nostr-relay-nestjs
repos.description: Relay with clean NestJS architecture, supports multiple storage backends

repos.name: bezysoftware/netstr
repos.description: General purpose Nostr relay written in C# with .NET

repos.name: UTXOnly/nost-py
repos.description: Easy to deploy and audit Python relay implementation

repos.name: lebrunel/nex
repos.description: Powerful and scalable relay in Elixir with PostgreSQL

repos.name: coracle-social/zooid
repos.description: Multi-tenant Nostr relay for communities

repos.name: pippellia-btc/rely
repos.description: Golang framework for building custom nostr relays

repos.name: hoytech/superconductor
repos.description: Java Nostr relay framework with Spring Boot

repos.name: nostriphant/transpher
repos.description: Experimental PHP Nostr relay implementation
repos.notes: PHP-based relay for web hosting environments

repos.name: v0l/snort
repos.description: Fast and feature-rich Nostr web client at snort.social
repos.notes: One of the most popular and polished web clients

repos.name: coracle-social/coracle
repos.description: Nostr web client with advanced relay management and outbox model
repos.notes: Pioneer of outbox model and relay-aware design

repos.name: irislib/iris-messenger
repos.description: Feature-rich Nostr web client by Martti Malmi (early Bitcoin contributor)
repos.notes: Built by one of Bitcoin's earliest contributors

repos.name: hzrd149/nostrudel
repos.description: Power-user Nostr web client with extensive NIP support

repos.name: verbiricha/habla.news
repos.description: Read, write, and curate long-form content (NIP-23) over Nostr

repos.name: SnowCait/nostter
repos.description: Twitter-like Nostr web client with familiar UI
repos.notes: Good onboarding experience for Twitter migrants

repos.name: pablof7z/olas
repos.description: Instagram-like image-focused Nostr client

repos.name: fiatjaf/njump
repos.description: Nostr static gateway for rendering nostr: URIs and NIP-19 identifiers on the web
repos.notes: Essential infrastructure for linking to Nostr content from the web

repos.name: ShadowySupercode/gc-alexandria
repos.description: Knowledge base and eReader app for Nostr

repos.name: abhay-raizada/nostr-forms
repos.description: Google Forms alternative built on Nostr (Formstr)
repos.notes: Decentralized form creation and data collection

repos.name: smolgrrr/Wired
repos.description: Anonymous-first client with proof-of-work notes (getwired.app)

repos.name: digi-monkey/flycat-web
repos.description: 2000s old-school style Nostr web client

repos.name: max21dev/groups
repos.description: NIP-29 Group Chat web client for relay-based group messaging

repos.name: CodyTseng/jumble
repos.description: Web client focused on browsing relay feeds with clean UI

repos.name: gzuuus/linktr-nostr
repos.description: Linktree-style application built on Nostr (Nostree)

repos.name: damus-io/damus
repos.description: Twitter-like Nostr client for iOS and macOS with zaps support
repos.notes: THE flagship iOS client; drove early Nostr adoption

repos.name: vitorpamplona/amethyst
repos.description: Feature-rich Android client supporting extensive NIP coverage
repos.notes: THE flagship Android client; supports more NIPs than almost any other client

repos.name: planetary-social/nos

repos.name: 0xchat-app/0xchat

repos.description: Nostr mobile client for Android with basic social features

repos.name: dluvian/voyage

repos.name: erdaltoprak/tamga

repos.notes: TweetDeck-style interface; uses egui for native rendering

repos.name: mikedilger/gossip
repos.description: Desktop client in Rust with egui, focused on relay-aware gossip model

repos.name: nickytonline/nostria
repos.description: Cross-platform Nostr app for Web, Desktop, iOS, and Android
